title: jobDetail
description: Schema for jobDetail in Nuix ECC REST API

taskType.description: type of the task, one of `Collect`, `Relocate`, `Deploy` or `Launch`

status.description: current status of the job (see values below)

bytesToCollect.description: total bytes to collect in the job

filesToCollect.description: total files to collect in the job

collectionName.description: name of the collection this job is running in

collectionId.description: id of the collection this job is running in

custodianName.description: name of the custodian associated with this collection, if any

custodianId.description: id of the custodian associated with this collection, if any

targetName.description: name of the target this job is collecting from

targetId.description: id of the target this job is collecting from

startTime.description: date/time of the start of this job

endTime.description: date/time of the end of this job
